title: More Fence Variants PAUSED
body:
**Welcome to MyticRift: More fence variants. the mod title says it all. dexe mod adds 245 new fences to your minecraft server. Diamond fence, Netherite fence, Concrete fence, and much more! check out the tab: Gallery for all photos!**


![bugs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e0aa1b4b2a27faf0194fdc351fa60df637c1793.png)

### Report bugs via: Github

![main logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4c5e04a72cba0c9eb5dc24222d7ccf7922f02a2.png)
![large chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c02f06ed731c8690da784383917c65e6fcb7f11.png)


![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/343a4cdc7be7fa26dfd02e5d47dfbffa99016f2f.png)

This mod is created with: intellij
